allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess; $pid8000 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($pid8000\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8000 -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $pid8000" } else { Write-Host "Port 8000 is free" })
